uplink.description: measurement frame: cable current 12.34 A on internal channel 0
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds 0xA0 'Trame de mesure': current type 0x0b -> 0x04D2=1234, /100=12.34 A. expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (courant.value=[12.34], unit 'A') and mapping to power.current.

uplink.description: measurement frame: current 50.00 A and equipment temperature 25.00 C
uplink._note: Synthetic: current 0x1388=5000/100=50.00 A; temperature type 0x08 -> 0x09C4=2500/100=25.00 C. Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js (courant.value=[50], temperature0.value=[25], voie '0'). Current maps to power.current, equipment temperature to the camelCase extra equipmentTemperature.
Synthetic: voltage type 0x0a -> 0x3840=14400 mV, /1000=14.4 V. Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js (tension.value=[14400], unit 'mV'). Normalized to power.voltage in volts.

uplink.description: measurement frame: equipment temperature -3.56 C (two's complement)
uplink._note: Synthetic two's-complement temperature: 0xFE9C as signed 16-bit = -356/100 = -3.56 C. Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js (temperature0.value=[-3.56]).

uplink.description: measurement frame: temperature sensor fault, current valid

warnings: one or more channels report the sensor-fault sentinel

uplink._note: Synthetic: temperature 0x8000 = -327.68 C is the upstream sensor-fault sentinel (reference temperature0.value=['erreur']); current 0x1388=50.00 A remains valid. Faulty temperature channel is dropped, current is emitted, and a warning is raised. channel reflects the temperature channel (voie 0), set first in the TLV walk.

uplink.description: life frame: harvester rail 3.550 V, capacitor rail 5.000 V
uplink._note: Synthetic 0x81 'Trame de vie': tensionv 0x0DDE=3550/1000=3.55 V; tensionc 0x1388=5000/1000=5 V. Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js (tensionv.value=3.55, tensionc.value=5). This device is self-powered with no battery, so the internal rails are emitted as camelCase extras (not battery).

uplink.description: error frame yields no power measurement
uplink._note: Synthetic 0x8E 'Trame d'erreur' (reference decodes a diagnostic 'Erreur' object). This codec only normalizes current/voltage/temperature, so an error frame returns errors.

uplink.description: unknown frame type yields no power measurement
uplink._note: Synthetic 0x83 -> reference 'Type de trame inconnu'; nothing to normalize.
Synthetic empty payload; reference returns an empty data object, this codec reports an explicit error.
